HTTP request handling doesn't validate all input parameters properly
issues.suggested_fix: Implement comprehensive input validation for all HTTP methods

issues.description: HTTP/2 service operations use excessive memory allocations under load
issues.suggested_fix: Optimize HTTP/2 service handling to reduce memory allocations

issues.description: HTTP/2 dispatcher implementation lacks proper error handling for failed operations
issues.suggested_fix: Add robust error handling for dispatcher operations

issues.description: Error handling doesn't capture all necessary context information
issues.suggested_fix: Enhance error handling to capture complete context

issues.description: Application setup lacks proper monitoring capabilities
issues.suggested_fix: Add performance metrics and monitoring hooks

issues.description: HTTP request routing doesn't properly validate path parameters
issues.suggested_fix: Implement strict validation for all path parameters and query strings

issues.description: HTTP/2 service parameter parsing creates excessive memory allocations
issues.suggested_fix: Optimize parameter parsing to reduce memory overhead

issues.description: HTTP/2 dispatcher formatting doesn't handle edge cases properly
issues.suggested_fix: Add comprehensive error handling for dispatcher formatting

issues.description: Error recovery doesn't preserve complete stack trace information
issues.suggested_fix: Enhance error recovery to capture full stack traces

issues.description: Application setup lacks performance metrics
issues.suggested_fix: Add monitoring and metrics for application performance
